display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Jobs + Steps
coordination primitive
every workflow is a Job;
Steps are the typed unit of work.
Step.embedded_job → recursion
(a Step can be a Job)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Registries
workflows as data
JobKind + StepPlugin + StepType +
SubjectKind — new work lands
as rows, not code

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Automation runners
event → work
boss-cybernetics (agents)
boss-dispatcher (step side-effects)
tenant tick engines (e.g. brewery)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

p.small:
Svelte 5 + Runes
pages per Subject + Job
dashboards, forms, lists

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Step plugins
per-step custom UX
JS bundles authored as data
at /admin/step-plugins

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Messages inbox
per-employee unified inbox
DMs + system signals
one place to look

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
boss CLI + APIs
operator + automation surface
deploy, backup, status,
agents via HTTP

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Subjects
identity-bearing things
boss-core::primitives::Subject
trait + per-kind impls + Parts
concrete kinds are tenant-defined

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Classes
taxonomies of Subjects
boss-core::primitives::Class
roles, departments, asset categories
(rows, not closed Rust enums)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Locations
places
boss-core::primitives::Location
hierarchy + timezone + geo;
also attaches as AttributePart

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Reservations
time-window claims
boss-core::calendar
employees / assets / workstations

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Knowledge Base pattern
Subject-oriented data
every Subject has a KB view:
Facts · Projections · Parts
catalog is one Class-level instance

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Event log
source of truth
boss-core::event::Event
immutable fact; projections rebuild;
hash-chained, REVOKE-protected

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Ledger projection
financial state
financial_facts → GL
via versioned posting rules
